title: Listening: At the Restaurant
learningGoal: Understand spoken polite commands and recognize postpositions denoting locations.
instructions: Listen to a customer talking to a waiter at a restaurant. Notice how the waiter uses very polite commands (iye) when addressing the customer.
listeningGoal: Identify formal imperatives and the postposition 'par' (on) in a spoken conversation.
audioScenario: A customer arrives at a restaurant and speaks to the waiter.

audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: Waiter: Hello Sir. Please come inside.

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: वेटर: सर, यहाँ बैठिये। पानी मेज़ पर है।
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: Waiter: Sir, yahaan baithiye. Paani mez par hai.
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: Waiter: Sir, please sit here. Water is on the table.
Customer: Thank you. Where is the food?

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: वेटर: खाना रसोई में है। यह मेनू लीजिये।
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: Waiter: Khaana rasoi mein hai. Yeh menu lijiye.
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: Waiter: Food is in the kitchen. Please take this menu.

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: ग्राहक: ठीक है। मैं पानी पीता हूँ।
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: Grahak: Theek hai. Main paani peeta hoon.

audioTranscriptFull: नमस्ते सर। अंदर आइये। नमस्ते। सर, यहाँ बैठिये। पानी मेज़ पर है। धन्यवाद। खाना कहाँ है? खाना रसोई में है। यह मेनू लीजिये। ठीक है। मैं पानी पीता हूँ।

questionSet.questionText: What does the waiter tell the customer to do first?
Where does the waiter say the water is?
What formal command does the waiter use to tell the customer to 'take' the menu?
What word is used to say 'Here' (as in 'Sit here')?

feedbackRules.onPass: Excellent! You can understand polite instructions in real-world scenarios.
feedbackRules.onFail: Review the formal imperatives. The waiter ends all his verbs with '-iye'.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good effort. Note that 'yahaan' means 'here', and 'kahaan' means 'where'.

audioAssets.audioTranscript: नमस्ते सर। अंदर आइये। नमस्ते। सर, यहाँ बैठिये। पानी मेज़ पर है। धन्यवाद। खाना कहाँ है? खाना रसोई में है। यह मेनू लीजिये। ठीक है। मैं पानी पीता हूँ।

hintText: Waiters will almost exclusively use the 'Aap' form (-iye) when speaking to customers.
